overview: Medical spa and men's health clinic offering TRT, hormone therapy, aesthetic injectables and laser treatments, IV therapy, peptides, medically supervised weight loss, and Direct Primary Care. All treatments are guided by licensed medical professionals and based on lab testing and clinical evaluation.
highlights: XERF skin tightening and Ultra LaseMD laser resurfacing
targetAudience: Health-conscious individuals seeking comprehensive medical wellness including hormone optimization, TRT, and preventative care.
